subject: Hey, what articles do we have?

Hey! I think there might be some confusion - you just sent me my own previous reply back to you! 😅

But since we're on the topic - I'm still curious about your AI agents angle. Are you thinking more about:

• The practical implementation side (how companies are building agent workflows)
• The business impact angle (ROI, use cases that actually work)
• The technical deep-dive (multi-agent systems, tool usage patterns)
• Or maybe a contrarian take (where agents are overhyped vs. where they delive
